spec.name: A Tightening In The Crawlway
spec.description: Here you are forced to slide on your belly through a particularly tight section of the crawlway, as the stones of the pyramid close together about you. Below you is a small, slippery-looking hole that plummets into blackness.

east.description: The crawlway gets a little larger to the east.

south.description: The crawlway continues to diminish in size to the south.

down.description: The hole looks very slippery and very dark.
